headlines.title: Venezuelan Journalist Recounts the Moment Twin Quakes Hit
headlines.description: Ana Vanessa Herrero, a journalist based in Caracas, Venezuela, joins TODAY with her first-hand account of what it was like on the ground when the consecutive earthquakes rattled the nation. Herrero also shares details about the difficulties and lack of resources that rescuers there are facing.

headlines.title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants
headlines.description: The Supreme Court has ruled to allow the Trump administration to end the Temporary Protected Status for thousands of immigrants from Haiti and Syria. NBC News' Gary Grumbach reports on the court's split among ideological lines and how the ruling impacts the administration's immigration policies.

headlines.title: Supreme Court strikes down Hawaii’s ‘vampire rule’ for gun owners
headlines.description: The Supreme Court struck down a Hawaii gun restriction that limits when people can carry firearms on certain private properties, known as the “vampire rule.”

headlines.title: Senate Reverses Course on War Powers After Visit From Trump
headlines.description: In a major reversal, Senate Republicans refused to rein in President Donald Trump’s war powers, hours after he chastised members of his own party for going against him. Earlier in the day, the president refused to take part in a planned ceremony to sign a bill overwhelmingly passed by both parties aimed at making housing affordable, until, he says, the Senate passes the SAVE Act, which would require voters show proof of ID and citizenship documents to vote. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports fo

headlines.title: Key measure of inflation climbed in May as surging oil prices pushed costs higher
headlines.description: Inflation is rising — but U.S. consumers seem to be shrugging it off. A key measure of price growth accelerated in May as surging oil prices pushed costs higher

headlines.title: Team USA in Spotlight Ahead of World Cup Match Against Turkey
headlines.description: Taylor Twellman, lead analyst, veteran of the U.S. Men’s National Team and MLS lead analyst on Apple TV, joins TODAY with a breakdown of what to expect from Team USA going into their match against Turkey in the 2026 FIFA World Cup after star player Christian Pulisic sat out with a calf injury. Twellman also weighs in on the Golden Boot Race between Argentina’s Lionel Messi, France’s Kylian Mbappé and Norway’s Erling Haaland.

headlines.title: From The Sports Desk: Is the Tartan party over?
headlines.description: A Brazilian side that featured Neymar sealed the top spot in Group C with a 3-0 win over Scotland yesterday, while the co-hosts Canada progressed to the knockouts for the first time in its history

headlines.title: ¡Doblete de Vinícius! Firma el segundo de Brasil con un letal cabezazo ante Escocia en Miami
headlines.description: Los europeos volvieron a regalar la pelota en la salida y Bruno Guimarães aprovechó en los linderos del área para servir al segundo palo donde el del Real Madrid conectó un letal cabezazo para firmar su doblete y ampliar la ventaja de la "Verdeamarela".

headlines.title: El Mundial une culturas con una fiesta de colores y pasión
headlines.description: Hinchas de Canadá, Suiza, Bosnia, Catar, México, Corea del Sur, Sudáfrica, Haití, Marruecos, Brasil, Chequia y Escocia llenaron de color, banderas y pasión los estadios de los tres países anfitriones en la última fecha de la fase de grupos.

headlines.title: México perfecto, Brasil lidera y Marruecos remonta en la tercera fecha del Mundial
headlines.description: México cerró perfecto el Grupo A, Suiza conquistó el B y Brasil lideró el C por diferencia de goles. Marruecos remontó ante Haití, Canadá y Sudáfrica clasificaron, mientras varios terceros esperan por un cupo.

headlines.title: Javier Aguirre, Memo Ochoa y Gilberto Mora reaccionan al triunfo de México ante República Checa
headlines.description: La Selección Mexicana aseguró el liderato de su grupo tras vencer a República Checa. Javier Aguirre destacó el trabajo del equipo, Guillermo Ochoa valoró el resultado y Gilberto Mora compartió sus impresiones tras una noche importante en el Mundial 2026.

headlines.title: México convence con goleada, Brasil avanza como líder y quedan definidos los grupos
headlines.description: Nuestros expertos analizan la goleada de México sobre República Checa, el liderato de Brasil en su grupo y los resultados que definieron los grupos A, B y C rumbo a los dieciseisavos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.
